Our Work

Evidence of delivery

Featured Projects

Selected engagements

Each project demonstrates our approach: clear problem definition, structured implementation, measurable results, and sustainable capacity building.

Labor & Employment

Labor Market Assessment & TVET Strategy

Federal Ministry of Labor

Comprehensive assessment of labor market dynamics and development of a national TVET strategy framework aligned with Somalia's employment priorities.

Read more
Livestock & One Health

Livestock Value Chain Strengthening

Development Partner

Design and implementation support for a livestock value chain program across pastoral regions, integrating veterinary services with livelihood support.

Read more
Governance

Governance Reform Implementation Support

Federal Government Institution

Institutional capacity assessment and reform roadmap for a federal government ministry, including performance management system design.

Read more
Development Programs

MEL System Design for Social Protection

International Development Partner

Development of a monitoring, evaluation, and learning system for a multi-year social protection program serving vulnerable populations.

Read more
Digital & IT

Digital Service Delivery Platform

Government Agency

Design and deployment of a digital platform for citizen service delivery, including data management and user-facing interfaces.

Read more
Labor & Employment

Youth Employment & Skills Program

UN Agency

Program design and implementation support for youth employment initiatives including apprenticeship frameworks and entrepreneurship training.

Read more

How We Document Results

Every engagement follows a structured approach to ensure comprehensive value at each stage.

01

Problem & Context

Analysis of the challenge, stakeholder landscape, and intervention opportunities

02

Approach & Implementation

Structured design, phased rollout, and adaptive management

03

Outputs & Results

Measurable deliverables, systems strengthened, and improvements achieved

04

Sustainability

Knowledge transfer, local ownership, and institutional strengthening

We work with government ministries, development partners, international organizations, and private sector actors.
